original_statement: how many yachts took at least 3 days to complete the race?
mutated_statement: how many entries took at least 3 days yet are recorded as finishing within 24 hours?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Added conflicting constraint + Attribute/source contrast: "yachts" → "entries" | added clause "recorded as finishing within 24 hours" that conflicts with "took at least 3 days" ("took at least 3 days" → "took at least 3 days" yet "recorded as finishing within 24 hours").

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）从 judge_thought 可见关键信息：代理将“至少3天”解读为 day>=3，并指出“Rows 3–10 有 day=3，共8条”，并进一步断言这些条目“hours component less than 24，满足在24小时内完成”。（2）代理具体表现为：执行了添加列和简单查询的机械操作，按 day>=3 过滤并直接给出计数8，未识别“至少3天”与“在24小时内完成”互斥的语义矛盾，也未请求澄清或修正。（3）归类理由：该行为符合“形式化执行而非语义澄清”的描述——代理在形式上完成筛选与计数，但未在语义层面检测或处理矛盾，因而归入无法意识到指令矛盾。
